titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَرْتَفِعُ طَمْثُهَا ثُمَّ يَعُودُ وَ حَدِّ الْيَأْسِ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The woman’s menstruation (Haydh) is raised, then it returns, and a limit of the despair from the menstruation (Haydh) (menopause)

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَرْتَفِعُ طَمْثُهَا ثُمَّ يَعُودُ وَ حَدِّ الْيَأْسِ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The woman’s menstruation (Haydh) is raised, then it returns, and a limit of the despair from the menstruation (Haydh) (menopause)

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ ذَهَبَ طَمْثُهَا سِنِينَ ثُمَّ عَادَ إِلَيْهَا شَيْ‏ءٌ قَالَ تَتْرُكُ الصَّلَاةَ حَتَّى تَطْهُرَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ ذَهَبَ طَمْثُهَا سِنِينَ ثُمَّ عَادَ إِلَيْهَا شَيْ‏ءٌ قَالَ تَتْرُكُ الصَّلَاةَ حَتَّى تَطْهُرَ .

segments: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Al Ays Bin Al Qasim who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about a woman whose menstruation (Haydh) had gone away for years, then something returned to her. Heasws said: ‘She should leave the Salaat until she is clean’.
en.hubeali.text: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Al Ays Bin Al Qasim who said, ‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about a woman whose menstruation (Haydh) had gone away for years, then something returned to her. Heasws said: ‘She should leave the Salaat until she is clean’.

segments: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from al-‘Is ibn al-Qasim who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman whose Hayd (menses) stops for years and it comes back again. He (the Imam) said, ‘She must not perform Salah (prayer) until she is Hayd (menses) free.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from al-‘Is ibn al-Qasim who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman whose Hayd (menses) stops for years and it comes back again. He (the Imam) said, ‘She must not perform Salah (prayer) until she is Hayd (menses) free.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/253)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/253)

narratorChain.raw: أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنِ الْعِيصِ بْنِ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَرْتَفِعُ طَمْثُهَا ثُمَّ يَعُودُ وَ حَدِّ الْيَأْسِ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The woman’s menstruation (Haydh) is raised, then it returns, and a limit of the despair from the menstruation (Haydh) (menopause)

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْمَرْأَةُ الَّتِي قَدْ يَئِسَتْ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ حَدُّهَا خَمْسُونَ سَنَةً .
arabic.text:
قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْمَرْأَةُ الَّتِي قَدْ يَئِسَتْ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ حَدُّهَا خَمْسُونَ سَنَةً .

وَ رُوِيَ سِتُّونَ سَنَةً أَيْضاً .

segments: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from one of our companions who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The woman who has despaired from the menstruation (Haydh), her limit is (age of) fifty years’.
And it has been reported as (age of) sixty years as well.
en.hubeali.text: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from one of our companions who said, ‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The woman who has despaired from the menstruation (Haydh), her limit is (age of) fifty years’. And it has been reported as (age of) sixty years as well.

segments: 2. Ali has narrated from Muhammad from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Menopause happens at the age of fifty. 5 It is also narrated that it is at the age of sixty.”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ali has narrated from Muhammad from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Menopause happens at the age of fifty. 5 It is also narrated that it is at the age of sixty.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور وآخره مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/253)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور وآخره مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور وآخره مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/253)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا قَالَ

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَرْتَفِعُ طَمْثُهَا ثُمَّ يَعُودُ وَ حَدِّ الْيَأْسِ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The woman’s menstruation (Haydh) is raised, then it returns, and a limit of the despair from the menstruation (Haydh) (menopause)

segments: إِذَا بَلَغَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ خَمْسِينَ سَنَةً لَمْ تَرَ حُمْرَةً إِلَّا أَنْ تَكُونَ امْرَأَةً مِنْ قُرَيْشٍ .
arabic.text: إِذَا بَلَغَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ خَمْسِينَ سَنَةً لَمْ تَرَ حُمْرَةً إِلَّا أَنْ تَكُونَ امْرَأَةً مِنْ قُرَيْشٍ .

segments: A number of our copanions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Tareyf, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the woman reaches fifty years, she would not see red (blood) except if she happens to be a woman from Qureysh’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our copanions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Tareyf, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the woman reaches fifty years, she would not see red (blood) except if she happens to be a woman from Qureysh’.

segments: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Tarif from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When a woman becomes fifty years old, she does not see anything red (experience Hayd (menses)) unless she is from Quraysh.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Tarif from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When a woman becomes fifty years old, she does not see anything red (experience Hayd (menses)) unless she is from Quraysh.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/253)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/253)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ طَرِيفٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَرْتَفِعُ طَمْثُهَا ثُمَّ يَعُودُ وَ حَدِّ الْيَأْسِ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ
titles.en: Chapter 21 – The woman’s menstruation (Haydh) is raised, then it returns, and a limit of the despair from the menstruation (Haydh) (menopause)

segments: حَدُّ الَّتِي قَدْ يَئِسَتْ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ خَمْسُونَ سَنَةً .
arabic.text: حَدُّ الَّتِي قَدْ يَئِسَتْ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ خَمْسُونَ سَنَةً .

segments: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Safwan Bin yahya, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjaj,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘A limit of the one who despairs from the menstruation (Haydh) is fifty years (of age)’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Safwan Bin yahya, from Abdul Rahman Bin Al Hajjaj, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘A limit of the one who despairs from the menstruation (Haydh) is fifty years (of age)’.

segments: 4. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Menopause happens at the age of fifty years.”’
en.sarwar.text: 4. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Menopause happens at the age of fifty years.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/254)
gradings.label: مجهول كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/254)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ شَاذَانَ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ الْحَجَّاجِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
